arts.ttl: Tottenham still face Ange Postecoglou transfer nightmare in worst-case squad scenario this week
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou knows that the Tottenham squad he currently has available will have to get him through the next round of the Europa League. Albeit unlikely, Spurs know that anything other than two points from their remaining games will leave them open to heading out.

arts.ttl: Former Spurs midfielder Brooke dies aged 64
arts.sum: Garry Brooke, who twice was part of FA Cup-winning teams at Tottenham Hotspur, dies aged 64.

arts.ttl: Tottenham offered 24-year-old winger with “magnificent technical qualities”
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been offered the chance to sign the AC Milan winger Noah Okafor. The 24-year-old has struggled for regular gametime at the Italian club this season and he needs to move on in search of regular playing time. He was linked with a move to Tottenham a few months ago. Spurs could provide […] The post Tottenham offered 24-year-old winger with “magnificent technical qualities” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer makes blunt Everton statement and delivers Dominic Calvert-Lewin verdict
arts.sum: Alan Shearer believes Dominic Calvert-Lewin has the potential to rekindle his previous goalscoring form at Everton but is increasingly concerned about whether he will

arts.ttl: Tottenham open to signing 27-year-old defender who will cost £30 million
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are interested in signing the Feyenoord defender David Hancko. According to TBR Football, the 27-year-old defender will cost around £30 million and it will be interesting to see if Tottenham step up pursuit of the player with an official offer. The player has been linked with Chelsea as well. Spurs need a central […] The post Tottenham open to signing 27-year-old defender who will cost £30 million appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Yakubu makes big David Moyes claim and explains what he needs to do at Everton
arts.sum: Yakubu believes David Moyes' return to Everton is a positive move that will lead the club to a better place

arts.ttl: Dele Alli is back! Romano reveals former Tottenham wonderkid's next club
arts.sum: Former England international Dele Alli is set to sign for Serie A side Como on Sunday, according to Fabrizio Romano. Troubled by personal issues and injury problems, former England international and Tottenham superstar Dele has not played a competitive game since late February 2023.

arts.ttl: David Moyes to add new member of Everton backroom staff after Jordan Pickford talks
arts.sum: David Moyes is due to promote head of academy goalkeeping David Lucas to a first-team role as he continues to shape an Everton backroom team that will be re-assessed in the summer

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Former Tottenham star who won FA Cup twice dies aged 64 after long illness
arts.sum: Garry Brooke starred in a trophy-laded spell for Tottenham in the 1980s, as the former midfielder won the FA Cup twice and the UEFA Cup in 1984. The club said they were "deeply saddened" to learn of his death aged 64

arts.ttl: Team News: Everton vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Everton and Tottenham Hotspur.
